confirmed.title: Confirmed by Shopper
confirmed.description: True only after the shopper explicitly confirms cancelling/refunding this order.

orderIdentifier.title: Order Identifier
orderIdentifier.description: Order number or Woo id to cancel. Leave blank for the most recent order.

reason.title: Cancellation Reason
reason.description: Why the shopper wants to cancel.

verifiedEmail.title: Verified Email
verifiedEmail.description: Pass the loggedInEmail variable. Required to cancel.
